mapper.select: select tsr.role_id, tsr.role_code, tsr.role_name, tsr.owner_id, trpl.id as link_id, trpl.valid_from, trpl.expire_on, trpl.status, trpl.app_id from t_sys_role tsr join t_role_post_link trpl on tsr.role_id = trpl.role_id and trpl.is_deleted = 0 and tsr.app_id = trpl.app_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsr.role_id, tsr.role_code, tsr.role_name, case when trpl.post_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_role tsr left join t_role_post_link trpl on tsr.role_id = trpl.role_id and trpl.is_deleted = 0 and tsr.app_id = trpl.app_id and trpl.post_id = #{postId} and trpl.app_id = #{appId} where tsr.is_deleted = 0

select tsp.post_id, tsu.post_code, tsu.post_name, trpl.id as link_id, trpl.valid_from, trpl.expire_on, trpl.create_time, trpl.app_id, trpl.status, trpl.app_id from t_sys_post tsp join t_role_post_link trpl on tsu.role_id = trpl.role_id and trpl.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
